name: rs-business-intelligence-portal
description: Production-ready SaaS portal for Republic of Srpska company intelligence.

scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm run start:dev -w @rsbi/api & npm run dev -w @rsbi/web & wait'
scripts.build: npm run build -w @rsbi/api && npm run build -w @rsbi/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @rsbi/api && npm run test -w @rsbi/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @rsbi/api && npm run lint -w @rsbi/web
